aliases: Platinum 8 MP Varifocal Bullet IP Camera
features: line crossing and intrusion detection, face detection
release_notes: LTS (LT Security Inc.) is a US-based distributor selling Hikvision OEM hardware under its own model numbering (Platinum, Pro-X, Sapphire, Pro-VS series). Note: Hikvision-derived firmware has shipped with ONVIF disabled by default since v5.5.0 — it must be manually enabled under Configuration > Network > Advanced Settings > Integration Protocol before use with Frigate/Home Assistant/third-party NVRs.

frigate.notes: Standard Hikvision-OEM RTSP path convention (channel 101 = main stream, 102 = sub stream) likely applies given this is Hikvision-derived hardware, but not independently confirmed against this exact relabeled SKU. ONVIF must be manually enabled in the camera's web UI (disabled by default on Hikvision firmware v5.5.0+).

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF must be manually enabled first (see release_notes). Once enabled, the generic ONVIF integration should work given the Hikvision-derived platform.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model, but Hikvision-OEM hardware typically works with Blue Iris's generic Hikvision camera profile.
